input.description: Find all toast calls in RelaySwap

state.output:
662:      toast.success('Swap completed successfully!')
673:      toast.error(`Swap failed: ${executionDetails || 'Unknown error'}`)
678:      toast.error('Swap was refunded')
843:        toast.error('No tokens found for this chain')
847:      toast.error('Failed to load tokens')
1414:      toast.error('Failed to detect tokens')
1422:      toast.error('Please enter a contract address')
1427:      toast.error('Please select a chain first')
1453:          toast.info(`${foundToken.symbol} already added to batch`)
1467:        toast.success(`Added ${foundToken.symbol} to batch swap`)
1470:        toast.error(`Token not found on ${batchChain.displayName}`)
1474:      toast.error('Failed to search token')
1480:      toast.error('No quote available')
1484:      toast.error('Please connect your wallet first')
1488:      toast.error('Missing swap parameters')
1492:      toast.error('Cannot swap the same token to itself')
1499:      toast.error('Farcaster Solana wallet not connected')
1503:      toast.error(`Recipient address required for ${toChain.displayName}`)
1507:      toast.error('Wallet client not ready. Please reconnect.')
1516:        toast.error('Please switch to the correct network in your wallet')
1542:          toast.error(parseSwapError(msg))
1549:          toast.error(parseSwapError(currentStep.error))
1555:          toast.info('Approving token spend...')
1558:            toast.info('Transaction submitted - waiting for confirmation...')
1569:        toast.error('Quote not ready. Please wait a moment and try again.')
1578:      toast.error(parseSwapError(msg))
1641:      toast.error(friendly)
1649:      toast.error('Please select chain and tokens to swap')
1654:      toast.error('Please connect your wallet first')
1663:      toast.error(`Blocked: ${names} flagged as high-risk. Deselect to proceed.`)
1683:          toast.error(`Blocked: ${names} flagged as malicious.`)
1696:        toast.success('Chain switched successfully')
1700:        toast.error('Please switch to the correct network in your wallet')
1712:      toast.error('Farcaster Solana wallet not connected')
1728:        toast.error('No tokens with balance selected')
1788:        toast.error('No transactions to execute in quote.')
1793:      toast.info(`Executing ${txSteps.length} step(s)...`)
1812:          toast.info(`${step.stepLabel} ${i + 1}/${txSteps.length} submitted...`)
1837:                    toast.error(`Step ${i + 1} failed on destination: ${statusData.details || ''}`)
1846:          toast.success(`${step.stepLabel} confirmed`)
1852:            toast.error('Transaction rejected')
1855:          toast.error(`${step.stepLabel} failed`)
1863:        toast.success(`Batch swap complete: ${Math.min(confirmedCount, depositCount)} deposit(s) submitted`)
1870:        toast.error('Batch swap failed')
1873:        toast.warning(`${failedTxs.length} step(s) failed`)
1899:      toast.error(errorMessage)
1984:      toast.success(randomMessage, {
2132:        toast.success('No active approvals found')
2134:        toast.success(`Found ${foundApprovals.length} active approval${foundApprovals.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
2171:        toast.error('Chain not supported')
2177:        toast.error('Moralis API key not configured')
2234:          toast.success('No active approvals found')
2236:          toast.success(`Found ${foundApprovals.length} approval${foundApprovals.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
2240:        toast.info('No approvals found')
2245:      toast.error(`Failed: ${err.message}`)
2343:      toast.info('Revoke submitted, confirming...')
2349:      toast.success('Approval revoked')
2354:        toast.error('Failed to revoke approval')
2380:          toast.info(`Revoking ${i + 1}/${selectedApprovalsArray.length}: ${approval.token.symbol}...`)
2393:            toast.error('Revoke cancelled')
2407:      if (successCount > 0) toast.success(`Revoked ${successCount} approval${successCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
2408:      if (failCount > 0) toast.error(`Failed to revoke ${failCount} approval${failCount > 1 ? 's' : ''}`)
2414:      toast.error('Failed to revoke approvals')
2490:        toast.error('No wallet connector found. Please install MetaMask or another Web3 wallet.')
2494:      toast.error('Failed to connect wallet')
2520:      toast.error('No wallet detected')
2548:          toast.error(`Failed to add ${chain.displayName} to wallet`)
2552:        toast.error(`Failed to switch to ${chain.displayName}`)
2657:                                  toast.info(`Switch to ${chain.displayName} in your wallet manually`)
2694:                    toast.info('Farcaster wallet cannot be disconnected. Refresh to reconnect.')
2699:                  toast.success('Wallet disconnected')
3759:                          toast.info(`${currency.symbol} already added`)
3791:                        if (heuristicResult.isSpam) toast.warning(`${currency.symbol} flagged as spam and deselected`)
3792:                        else toast.success(`Added ${currency.symbol}${parseFloat(balanceFormatted) > 0 ? ` (${parseFloat(balanceFormatted).toFixed(4)})` : ''}`)

state.title: grep -n "toast\." /home/user/sandbox/workspace/frontend/src/pages/RelaySwap.tsx | head -80
